publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Octateuch
msItem.colophon: ተፈጸመ፡ በዝየ፡ ኦሪት፡ ሰመንቱ፡ ብሔር፡ በሰላመ፡ እግዚአብሔር።

msItem.title: Epistle of Eusebius to Carpianus (General record)
Senodos
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ፩አምላክ። ድሙራን፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘሀሎ፡ ውስተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘ፲ ወ፪ሐዋርያት፡ ፻ወ፳ወ፯ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘአቡሊድስ፡ ሊተ፡ ጳጳሳት፡ ዘሮምያ፡ ፴ወ፰። ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘ፫፻፲ወ፷፳ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘጉባኤ፡ ኤንቆ፡ ፳ወ፭፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘጉባኤ፡ ቄሳርያ፡ ፲ወ፭። ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘጉባዔ፡ ግንግራ፡ ፳። ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘጉባኤ፡ ሀገረ፡ አንጾኪያ፡ ፹ወ፬ሲኖዶ ስ፡ ዘቅዱስ፡ ባስልዮስ፡ ፻ወ፯ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘቅ ዱስ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ አፈ፡ ወርቅ፡ ፲ወ፪ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘጉባዔ፡ ቊስጥንጥንያ፡ ፳ወ፫ኍልቆሙ፡ ፱፻ወ፸በክመ፡ ኍልቁ፡ አናቅጽ፡ ስብሐት፡ ለእ ግዚአብሔር፡ ለዝሉፉ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አ ሜን፡ ወአሜን፡ ለይኩን፡ ለይኩን።

bibl.title: Catalogue raisonné de manuscrits éthiopiens appartenant à Antoine d’Abbadie
Ueber die Aethiopischen Handschriften zu Tübingen
Zeitschrift für die Kunde des Morgenlandes
Il Sēnodos etiopico. Canoni pseudoapostolici: Canoni dopo l’Ascensione, Canoni di Simone il Cananeo, Canoni Apostolici, Lettera di Pietro, Textus; Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium

msItem.title: Ecclesiastic (apostolic) canons (71): titloi
msItem.incipit: ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘአው፡ (sic) ቅዱሳን፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ዘሠርዑ፡ ለአርትዖ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ቅድስት፡ አኀብ ሮተ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘአበው፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ኀሩያን፡ ላዕለ፡ መርሐ፡ (sic) ግብረ፡ አናቅጽ፡ ወላዕሌሃ፡ ኆልቊ፡ ይቀልል፡ ክመ፡ አውፅአ፡ ትእዛዝ፡ ወፍትሐ፡ በውእቱ። ወላዕለ፡ ኲሉ፡ ምቅቀ ም፡ ክመ፡ ኍልቆ፡ አናቅጽ። ይእቲ፡ ፻፳ወ፯ አናቅጸ፡ ኍልቁ፡ ወቦ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ እምኔሃ፡ ዘቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ዘወሀቡ፡ ሐቀርያት፡ በ እዶ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡ ዘለአኩ፡ ቀዲሙ፡ ወይ እቲ፡ ፶ወ፯አናቅጽ።። ቀደሚ፡ ክስተተ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘሐዋርያት፡ ቅዱሳን፡ ፸ወ፪አናቅጹ።
msItem.note: Here follows a list of seventy-three (sic) titloi.

msItem.title: Apostolic canons (56): titloi
msItem.incipit: ወእምኔሃ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ዘወሀብዋ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ካዕበ፡ በዕደ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡ ዘለአኩ፡ ቀዲ ሙ፡ ወይእቲ፡ ፶ወ፯አናቅጽ፡ ኆልቊ።
other Orders of the Apostles, given through Clement, fifty-seven in number
msItem.note: The list of titloi enumerates only fifty-six.

msItem.title: Ecclesiastic (apostolic) canons (71)
msItem.incipit: ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘአበው፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ዘሠርዑ፡ ለአርትዖ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን።

bibl.title: Ad suam Historiam Æthiopicam antehac editam Commentarius, In quo Multa breviter dicta fusius narrantur: contraria refelluntur: Atque hac occasione præter res Æthiopicas multa Autorum, quædam etiam S. Scripturæ loca declarantur: Aliaque plurima geographica, historica et critica, Inprimis verò antiquitatem ecclesiasticam illustrantia, alibi haud facilè obvia, exponuntur vt variarum observationum loco haberi possit
bibl.publisher: Sumptibus Johannis David Zunneri, Typis Martini Jacqueti

msItem.title: Canons of S. Simon the Canaanite (1st recension)
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ቀኖና፡ ዘአበው፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ንጹሓን፡ ወቅዱሳን፡

msItem.title: Canons of S. Simon the Canaanite (subunit)
msItem.incipit: ሥርዓተ፡ ክህነት፡ ዘስምዖን፡ ቊናዊ፡ በእንተ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ ክርስታያን፡ ቅድስት።

msItem.title: Canons of SS. Matthew and Simon
msItem.incipit: በእንተ፡ ዓሥራት፡ ወበኲር።

msItem.title: Canons of S. Paul 1
msItem.incipit: ወአዘዘ፡ ጳወሎስ፡ ሐዋርያ፡ ወይቤ፡ ኲሉ፡ መሃይምን፡ ወመሐይምንት፡ ሶበ፡ ይክውን፡ ጽባሐ፡ ኢይግበሩ፡ ግብረ፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ይትሐፀቡ፡ እደዊሆሙ፡ ወይጸል ዩ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ፈጣሪሆሙ፡ etc.

msItem.title: Canons of SS. Peter and Paul
msItem.incipit: በእንተ፡ ዕረፍተ፡ አግብርት፡ በዕለታት፡ ዘይደሉ።

msItem.title: Canons of the Apostles
msItem.incipit: በእንተ፡ ዓቀበ፡ ጊዜ፡ አ ቅዱሙ፡ ጸሎተ።

msItem.title: Canons of S. Paul 2
msItem.incipit: በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ኖሙ፡ ዘክመ፡ ይትገበር፡ ተዝካር።

msItem.title: ወካዕበ ፡ በእንተ ፡ እለ ፡ ተጸውዑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምሳሕ ፡ ወተዝካረ ፡ ሙታን ።
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ተጸውዑ፡ ውስተ፡ ምሳሕ፡ ወተዝካረ፡ ሙታን።

msItem.title: ወካዕበ ፡ ነገሮሙ ፡ በእንተ ፡ እለ ፡ ይስደዱ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ሃይማኖት ፡ ወይጐዩ ፡ እምሀር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሀገር ።
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ነገሮሙ፡ በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ይስደዱ፡ በእንተ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ወይጐዩ፡ እምሀር፡ ውስተ፡ ሀገር።

msItem.title: Canons of SS. Peter and Paul
msItem.incipit: በእንተ፡ ዓቀበ፡ መዓርገ፡ ክህነት።

msItem.title: Canons of St Paul
msItem.incipit: ትእዛዝ፡ ወቀኖና፡ ዘጳውሎስ፡ ላእክ፡ በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ይመጽኡ፡ ኀበ፡ ምሥጢርነ፡ ሐዲሳን፡ ወባእደንሂ።

msItem.title: Apostolic canons Abṭelisāt 2nd recension (80)
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘሐዋርያት፡ ቅዱሳን፡ ዘነገረ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡ ወይእቲ፡ በጥልሳት፡ ዘኀበሩ፡ ባቲ፡ አርደኢሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስትስ፡ ወኍልቆሙ፡ ፹ወ፩ትእዛዝ።
msItem.note: Wright: Canons of the Apostles, given through Clement, eighty-one in number

msItem.title: Apostolic canons (56)
msItem.incipit: ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ዘወሁበዎ፡ ሐዋርያ ት፡ በእደ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡ ቀዲሙ፡ ዘለአክዎ።
msItem.note: Canons of the Apostles, given through Clement, fifty-six in number

msItem.title: Apostolic canons Abṭelisāt 1st recension (81)
msItem.incipit: ዘቲ፡ ያእቲ^ ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘሐዋርያት፡ ቅዱሳት፡ ወይእቲ፡ ዘ ዜነወ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡ በእንተ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ መምህሩ፡ ወይቲ፡ ትሠመይ፡ እልበጥልሳት፡ ዘተጋብኡ^ ፡ ላዕሌ ሃ፡ ሐዋርያቲሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክር ስቶስ። ወኍልቆሙ፡ ፹ወ፩እብሊስ።
msItem.note: Wright: Canons of the Apostles called titloi, eighty-one in number

msItem.title: Canons of S. Simon the Canaanite 2nd recension
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘአበው፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ንጹሓን፡ ወቅዱሳን።
msItem.note: Canons of the Apostles, twenty-five in number, almost identical with those given above under no. 2

msItem.title: Apostolic Canons after Ascension
msItem.incipit: ዝነቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ዜናሆሙ፡ ለሐዋ ርያት፡ እምድኀረ፡ ዓርገ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ወአምላ ክነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ዘአዘዙ፡ በሲኖዶ ስ፡ ዘጸሐፈ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ።
msItem.note: Canons of the Apostles, after the Ascension of our Lord, thirty in number

msItem.title: Apostolic canons (81)
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ ሐዋርያቱ፡ ምስለ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡ ዘተፈነወ፡ ለአሐዛብ፡ ሕገ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን።
msItem.note: Canons of the Apostles, seventy-nine in number

msItem.title: Canons of Clement, which he received in a letter from S. Peter
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘቀሌምንጦስ፡ ዘጸሐፈ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ ረድእ፡ ወርእስ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ዘነገረ፡ በእንተ፡ እግዚ እነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ደቤ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡ ዘእምጴጥሮስ፡ ርእስ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ረድኡ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ። Beginning, ወይቤሎሙ፡ ወልድየ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡ ኢታጥ ምቅ፡ መነሂ፡ በሕልያን፡ ወምቱር፡ ላዕለ፡ ጥምቀት፡ ወዘነሥአ፡ ሕልያነ፡ በሤጥ፡ ምቱ ር፡ ውእቱ፡ ወውጉዝ፡ ወርጉም፡ እምአፉየ፡ አነ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ ንኡስ፡ እምሐዋርያት፡ ወመ ክፈልቱ፡ ይኩን፡ ምስለ፡ ሴምን፡ መሰርይ፡ ወይሁደ፡ ረሲዕ።
msItem.note: Canons of Clement, which he received in a letter from S. Peter
msItem.colophon: ወፈጸምና፡ ለዛቲ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ በሰለም፡ አሜን።

msItem.title: Titles of the Canons of the Council of Nicaea I
msItem.incipit: ዘንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘማኀበረ፡ ቅዱሳን፡ ፫፻፲ወ፰ዘሠር ዑ፡ በኒቅያ፡ ፳ቀናና።
msItem.note: Titles of the Canons of the Council of Nicaea 1 (the canons are twenty in number, though the titloi enumerate twenty-two)

msItem.title: Canons of the Council of Nicaea I
msItem.note: Canons of the Council of Nicaea, twenty in number

msItem.title: Titles of the Canons of the Council of Nicaea II
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘ፫፻፲ ወ፰ርቱዓነ፡ ሃይሜኖት፡ ዘሠርዑ፡ ማኀበረዓቢይ።
msItem.note: Titles of the Canons of the Council of Nicaea 2 (the canons are eighty-four in number, though the titloi vary).

msItem.title: Canons of the Council of Nicaea II
Titles of the Canons of the Council of Gangra
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሣህል፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ እለ፡ ተጋብአ፡ በግንግራን፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶሳት፡ ወሠርዑ፡ ፳ትእዛዝ።
msItem.note: Titles of the Canons of the Council of Gangra (the canons are twenty in number, though the titloi give twenty-one).

msItem.title: Canons of the Council of Gangra
Canons of the Council of Sardes
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘጉባዔ፡ ስርድቀ፡ ውኖ ልቆሙ፡ ፻ወ፵ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶሳት፡ ወሠርዑ፡ ዕሥራ፡ ወ፩ተ፡ ትእዛዘ፡ ተጋቢኦሙ፡ እም ርኁቅ፡ በሓውርት።
msItem.note: Canons of the Council of Sardes, twenty-one in number

msItem.title: Titles of the Canons of the Council of Antioch
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘማኀበረ፡ አንጾኪያ፡ ወኍ ልቆሙ፡ ፲፫ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶሳት፡ ወሠርዑ፡ ፳፭ ትእዛዝ።
msItem.note: Titles of the Canons of the Council of Antioch (the canons are twenty-five in number, though the titloi give only twenty-three).

msItem.title: Canons of the Council of Antioch
Exposition of the Ten Commandments
msItem.incipit: ትርጓሜ፡ ዓሠርቱ፡ ቃላት፡ ዘተርጉመ፡ ዩሐንስ፡ አፈ፡ ወርቅ፡ ሊቀ፡ ጳጳሳት፡ ዘቍስጥንጥንያ፡ ሀገር፡ በእንተ፡ ዓሠርቱ፡ ቃላት፡ ዘነበበ፡ እግ ዚአብሔር፡ ለሙሴ፡ በድበረ፡ ሲና። ወእምድኀረዝ፡ አይደእኩ፡ ኦፍቁር፡ ስብ ሐተ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ዘአልቦ፡ ኁልቁ፡ በዘ፡ ኢይትኈልቍ፡ እስክ፡ ለዓለም።

msItem.title: Discourse on the Essence of the Holy Trinity
msItem.incipit: ግጻዌ፡ ትምህርት፡ ሕግ፡ ወሥርዓት፡ ወተግሣጽ፡ ዘተሠርዓ፡ በዕለተ፡ ህሉና፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ዘይትነ በብ፡ ወትረ፡ ላዕለ፡ ሕዝብ፡ ወህላዌ፡ መለኮቱ ዘኢይትነገር፡ ወዘኢይትሌለይ፡ ወኢይትፈ ለጥ፡ ወኀብረተ፡ ቃል፡ ዘእምቅድስተ፡ ሥላ ሴ፡ ይእቲ፡ እንተ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ሕሊና፡ ታህሉ፡ ምስሌነ፡ አሜን።

msItem.title: Discourse on How to distinguish between Good and Evil
msItem.incipit: ግጻዌ፡ ትምህርት፡ ከመ፡ ይፍልጡ፡ ሠናየ፡ ወእኩየ።

msItem.title: Discourse on the Fear of God
msItem.incipit: ግጻዌ፡ ትምህርት፡ አብስልጢሳት፡ ቀናና፡ በእንት፡ ፍርሃት፡ እግ ዚአብሔር።

msItem.title: Discourse on the Ancient People, and Refutation of the Jews
msItem.incipit: ትምህርት፡ ወትግሣጹ፡ በእንት፡ ቀደሚ፡ ሕዝብ፡ ወዝልፈት፡ እስራ ኤል።

msItem.title: Discourse of Gregory of Armenia against the Jews
msItem.incipit: ግጻዌ፡ ወትግሣጹ፡ አብ ሰልጢስ፡ ቀናና፡ በእንት፡ ዘዘለፎሙ፡ ወገሠ ጾሙ፡ ወአስትሐፈሮሙ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ጎርጎርዮስ፡ ሊቀ፡ ጳጳሳት፡ ዘአርማንያ፡ ገሠጾሙ፡ ወዘ ለፎሙ፡ ለአይሁድ፡ እኩያን፡ ሀለዉ፡ ህየ፡ ምስሌሁ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ጎርጎርዮስ፡ በእንት፡ እለ፡ ይብሉ፡ ዘተወልደ፡ እማርያም፡ ኢኮነ፡ ወልደ፡ እግ ዚአብሔር፡ አለ፡ ሰብእ፡ አላ፡ ወልደ፡ ሰብእ።

msItem.title: Hortatory discourse to believers, who desire to walk in the path of wisdom and knowledge
msItem.incipit: ግጹው፡ ወሥርዓት፡ ትምህርት፡ ወጥበብ፡ ወተግሣጽ፡ አብሰልጢስ፡ ቀናና፡ ዘተሠርዓ፡ ለእለ፡ የአምኑ፡ በሕሉና፡ እግ ዚአብሔር፡ ወእለ፡ ይፈቅዱ፡ ይስምዑ፡ ትምህርተ፡ ጽድቅ፡ ወይሖሩ፡ በጥበብ፡ ወበአ እምሮ፡ ወበለብዎ፡ በፍናዋተ፡ ጽድቅ፡ ወሐ ይወት፡ ወይግበሩ፡ ፍሬ፡ ጽድቅ፡ ዘይደልዋ፡ ለነፍሰሙ፡ ወያአምሩ፡ ስርዋ፡ ለጥበብ፡ ወኅበሪሃ። ጥበብ፡ ትኄይስ፡ እም ኵሉ፡ መዛግብት፡ ወምግባር፡ ትበቍዕ፡ እምኩሉ፡ ብዕል፡ ዘበምድር፡ ጥበብ፡ ዝእቤ፡ አኮ፡ ጥበበዝ፡ ዓለም።

msItem.title: ʾAbsǝliṭis qanonā baʾǝnta nǝssǝḥa tǝmhǝrt za-taśarʿa ʾǝmḫaba ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer ʾǝgziʾǝna ʾIyasus Krǝstos
msItem.incipit: አብስልጢስ፡ ቀኖና፡ በእንት፡ ንስሐ፡ ትምህርት፡ ዘተሠርዓ፡ እምኅበ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ከርስትስ፡ ወተስእሎ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ከርስትስ፡ እምድኅረ፡ ተንሥአ፡ እሙ^ትን፡ በደብረ፡ ዘይት፡ ወይቤሎ፡ ሊቅ፡ ንግረነ፡ ወአእመርነ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ ንስሐ፡ ወዘይደሉ፡ ከመ፡ ንግር ወንምሀር፡ ለሕዝብ፡ ትምህርት፡ ሕይወት።

msItem.title: Discourse of the 318 Fathers on the Trinity
msItem.incipit: ነገር፡ ዘቅዱሳን፡ አበው፡ ፫፻፲ወ፳ዘይከውን፡ ሕንጸ፡ ለመነኮሳት። በእንተ፡ ሥለሰ፡ ቅድስት፡ እምነትሙ፡ እም ዛተ፡ ቅድስት፡ ሃይማናት፡ እንት፡ በኒቅያ፡ ሀገር፡ እምቅዱሳን፡ እንት፡ ለአለብዎትሙ፡ ለየወብን፡ ወለአእምሮ።

msItem.title: Canons of the Council of Neo-Caesarea: titles
msItem.incipit: ሲኖዶስ፡ ዘአውከሳርያ፡ ባት፡ ትጋብኡ፡ ፶ኤ ጲስ፡ ቀጳሳት፡ ወሥርዑ፡ ሥርዓት፡ ፲ወ፱ት እዛዝ
msItem.note: Titles of the Canons of the Council of Neocesarea

msItem.title: Canons of the Council of Neo-Caesarea
msItem.note: Canons of the Council of Neocesarea

msItem.title: Canons of the Council of Ancyra: titles
Canons of the Council of Ancyra

msItem.colophon: ተፈጸመ፡ በዝ የ፡ ሲኖደ ሶሙ፡ ለሐዋርያት፡ ወለጳጳሳት። ስብሐት፡ ለእግዚአብሐር፡ አብ፡ ወለወልዱ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ከርስትሰ፡ etc.

extent.note: One unnumbered leaf at the end, referred to as in the digitization by the library.

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation by the library in the upper right corner.

collation.signatures: Decorated quire marks in the upper inner corner of the first folium of each quire, starting on .

layout.ab: The upper line is written above the ruling.
The bottom line is written above the ruling.
layout.note: A different ruling pattern, with ruled frames and no horizontal ruled lines, is used on some of the leaves that contain miniatures (e.g. ).

handNote.desc: Written in a small, elegant character, of the latter half of the 17th cent.
Hand of additio 1, during the reign of ʾIyāsu II (1730-1755) and tenure of John XVII of Alexandria (1727-1745)
Hand of additio 19 and additio 20 and additio 21
Hand of additio 23 additio 24 additio 25 and additio 26

decoDesc.summary: The manuscript is exceptionally rich in its decorations. It features headpieces, interlace bands, and illustrations depicting Old and New Testament figures. The decorations accurately imitate the style and iconography of the earlier Octateuch kept in Amba Gǝšän Maryam and painted in the . The New Testament scenes follow the long cycle iconography attested in earlier Gospel manuscripts.

decoNote.desc: Coloured borders and devices.

desc.ref: Moses receiving the Tables of the Law

decoNote.desc: Prophet Portrait Moses writing the Law
Aaron with the which has budded
Historical Persons Portrait: Eusebius and Carpianus stand opposite each other and respectively hold a and a and

A miniature of the Annunciation to Zacharias. Zachary, to the right, holds a and a . Gabriel, to the left, holds a and performs a rather than one of speech. The scene takes place in front of a Tempietto which functions as an explicit to the Eusebian Apparatus, and features a lamp and a . At the top of this picture, on the right and left, are several birds, namely two ሰጉና፡ or ostrich, as is typical in miniature of the Tempietto, and two ጢራ።. The miniature is the result of a mixing of models

desc.ref: Anna and Joachim giving over Mary to the service of the Temple

decoNote.desc: A miraculous episode from the infancy of Mary. An with a brings food to Mary in the Temple
A miniature of the Annunciation. Gabriel, to the right, performs a and holds a , while St Mary is spinning

The Nativity of Jesus. In the upper register it features three adoring angels together with the Ass and Ox next to the reclining St Mary. The lower register features Joseph, and Salome next a shepherd with two sheep
The Three Magi are introduced to St Mary and the infant Jesus Christ by an angel who performs a pointing gesture and holds a cross
The Baptism of Jesus features three angels, Jesus Christ with crossed arms, and St John the Baptist
The miniature of the Massacre of the Innocents features Herod, depicted with a and , and several guards and women, one of whom is shown in an orans pose
A miniature of the Transfiguration of Jesus. Jesus Christ stands in a between Moses and Elijah

A miniature of the Entry into Jerusalem. Rather than taking up an opening, as is conventional in the Ethiopian art, the scene unfolds on the recto and verso. On the recto, Jesus, surrounded by Apostles and welcomed by a crowd of elderly men and children with halos, rides an ass. The welcoming crowd continues on the verso. This latter group, features also Zacchaeus, and individuals holding palm fronds

A miniature of our Lord washing His Disciples' feet. The figures of the Apostles are divided into two registers. Jesus in the upper register is represented in the act of washing the feet of Peter, who touches his head with his hand in accordance with the account of the Gospels
The miniature of the Arrest of Jesus features two soldiers binding Jesus with a rope swung round his neck. One of the captors hold a .

The Crucifixion of Jesus featuring the
Jesus on the Cross. He is flanked to the left by an unidentified woman and Mary, who performs a and is the only figure without a , and to the right by John, in an stance. Two angels appear at the sides of the cross together with the anthropomorphic the skull of Adam is represented below the cross
Unusually, a second representation of the Crucifixion featuring the follows the previous miniature. This one features two angels and the Two Thieves
A miniature showing the Deposition of Jesus with Joseph of Arimathea, Nicodemus, and two unidentified women

A miniature of the Lamentation of Jesus in which several figures, including Nicodemus, Mary Magdalene, and several other unidentified figures. Two angels, Gabriel and Michael, appear at the top of the scene performing a Gesture of Disbelief
A miniature of the Entombment of Jesus with Joseph of Arimathea and Nicodemus
A miniature of the Holy Women at Tomb, featuring two Holy Women, two guards, and an
A miniature of the Descent into Hell in which Jesus Christ, who is surrounded by a and holds a staff , pulls Adam out of Sheol.
A miniature of the Post-Resurrection Appearance of Jesus in which Jesus Christ , accompanied by an , appears to Mary Magdalene, and two other men
A miniature of the Ascension of Jesus. Jesus Christ, in an oval , performs a . He is flanked by two angels. Below him are the twelve Apostles and the Virgin St Mary in an orans pose
A miniature of the Maiestas Dei with a standing Jesus Christ in an oval , who performs a , holds a , and is surrounded by the Tetramorph arranged in the Angel⇨Eagle⇨Ox Lion order
A second miniature of the Maiestas Dei with God the Father, who performs a , holds a , and is surrounded by the Tetramorph, arranged in the Angel⇨Eagle⇨Ox Lion order, and adoring angels
An Evangelist Portrait of Matthew
The Evangelists Matthew and Mark, writing their Gospels
The Evangelists Matthew and Mark
The Evangelists Luke and John
The Luke and John
A miniature of the twelve Apostles arranged in two lines

additions.note: This volume contains copies of many gʷǝltāt, i. e. deeds of gift, grants, or donations of various kings.

item.desc: A letter of John, patriarch of Alexandria, to king ʾIyāsu (II.), written by a later hand. Though the hand is classified by Wright as 'later', this is possibly not the case.
item.q: መጽሐፈ፡ መልእክት፡ ዘተፈነወት፡ እምዮሐንሰ፡ ገብረ፡ እግ ዚአብሔር፡ ዘተሰምየ፡ በጸጋሁ፡ ወተሠይመ፡ በፈቃዱ፡ ለተልእኮ፡ መንበር፡ መርቆሳዊ፡ በሀገር፡ ዓባይ፡ እለ፡ እስክንድርያ፡ ወትዕይንት፡ አየሩሳሌም፡ ወገዳማት፡ ምስር፡ ወበሓ ውርተ፡ አትዮጵያ፡ ስላም፡ etc. ወተጽሕፈ፡ በዘመነ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ወንጌላዊ፡ በእደ፡ አባ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ሊቀ፡ ጳጳሳት፡ ዘእለ፡ እስክንድርያ፡ አ መ፡ ከ፳ወ፭ለመስክረም። ወበ፲፻ወበ፬፻ወ፷እምዓመተ፡ ሰማዕታት፡ ንጹሓን።

item.desc: Land donation (gʷǝlt) of Śāhla Dǝngǝl (A.D. 1832-40, and again 1841-55) to the priests of Darasge, in Amharic.
King ʾIyāsu (II), ʾAdyām Sagad, builds Dabra Bǝrhān in the 10th year of his reign (A.D. 1739-40).
item.q: በአኰቴተ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈሰ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ተወጥነ፡ ሕንፃ፡ ደብረ፡ ብርሃን፡ በዘመነ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ ለንጉሠ፡ ነገሥት፡ አድያም፡ ሰገድ፡ ዘበጸጋ፡ ጥም ቀት፡ ተሰምየ፡ ኢያሱ፡ በ፲ዓመተ፡ መንግ ሥቱ፡ በዘመነ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ወሠርቀ፡ ቲቶ፡ ዕለተ፡ እሑድ፡ ወ፭ጥንትዮን፡ ወአበቅቴ፡ ፲፩ወመጥቅዕ፡ ፲፱ etc.
item.note: Various visits of the king to this place are mentioned, with gifts to the priests. Partly in Ethiopic, partly in Amharic.

item.desc: An Amharic document relating to Takla Hāymānot, Takla Giyorgis and Gʷālu.
List of books left after the persecution (?), in the same hand as the Ms
item.q: ኅልቈ፡ መጻሕፍት፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ አብ፡ ዘተርፈ፡ እምስደት፡ ፳፫ወንጌል፡ ፪ሐሣብ፡ ፪ስንክሳር፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ሲኖዶሰ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ምሥጢር፡ አፈ፡ ወርቅ፡ ሐዲገ፡ ዕልወት፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ጥር፡ ክብረ፡ ነገሥት፡ ፪ተአምረ፡ ማርያም፡ ገድለ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ፪ሚላድ፡ ጉባ ኤ፡ ነቢያት፡ ርቱዓነ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ብርሃን፡ ኦሪት፡ አነ፡ ፈሲለደሰ፡ ነገርኩ፡ ዘወሀቡኒ፡ አግባእኩ፡ ወዘከልኡኒ፡ አውገዝኩ፡ በአፈ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈሰ፡ ቅዱሰስ፡ በአፈ፡ እግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ በአፈ፡ ፲ወ፭ነቢያት፡ በአፈ፡ ፲ወ፪ሐዋርያት፡ በ፸ወ፪አርድ እት፡ በአፈ፡ ሰብእ፡ ወመላእክት፡ ውጉዝ፡ ለይኩነ፡ ከመ፡ ይሁዳ፡ ሰያጤ፡ እግዚእ、፡ ከመ፡ ሤሞን፡ መሠርይ፡ ጥፉአ፡ ርጉመ፡ ለይኩን፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን።

item.desc: In the same hand.
item.q: በአኩቴተ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈሰ፡ ቅዱስ። ተጽሕፈ፡ ንዋዩ፡ ዘንጉሥነ፡ ወናግ፡ ሰገድ፡ እም፴በመስከረም፡ ዘተፈቅደ፡ ዘወሀበ፡ ዢንጽራር፡ ጔታ፡ ቴዎድሮስ፡ ለሸብር፡ ፯፻፳፯ላህም፡ ፲አ ውራ፡ ፫፻፳ወ፩ብዕራይ፡ ፲፻ወ፫፻፭፱በግዕ፡ ፲፭ከልብ፡ ፫ጠሊ ። ። ዘአቃምባ፡ ዘወሀበ፡ ዢንጽራር፡ ጔታ፡ ቴዎድሮስ፡ ፯፻፷ላህም፡ ፲አውራ፡ ፶ብዕራይ፡ ፲፭ከልብ፡ ፲፻፹ወ፫በግዕ፡ ፻ጠሊ ። ። ። በቀዳሚ፡ በዘመነ፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ናኦድ፡ ጒልት፡ ዘተውኅበ፡ ኋይት፡ ለየማን፡ ደብተራ፡ ገብሩ፡ ወወልዱ፡ ዘርአ፡ መስቀል፡ ወድኅረሂ፡ በዘመነ፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ልብነ፡ ድንግል፡ ወኮነ፡ ዘመነ፡ ስደት፡ ወሞተ፡ ውእቱ፡ ደብተራ፡ በስደት፡ ወአተረፈ፡ ሎቱ፡ ወልድ፡ ዘእ ንበለ፡ ወለት፡ ወካዕበ፡ በዘመነ፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ገላውዴዎስ፡ አውረሰቶ፡ ይእቲ፡ ወለት፡ ለመሃተመ፡ ሥላሴ ። ። ። ዘሄደ፡ ወዘተአገሎ፡ ው(sic).
item.note: King Nāʿod died A.D. 1508, Lǝbna Dǝngǝl 1540, Claudius 1559, and Wanag Sagad (Minās) 1563.

item.desc: Gʷǝlt of king Gabra Masqal ʿAmda Ṣǝyon (A.D. 1314-44), in a modern hand.
Gʷǝlt of ʾƎskǝndǝr, Constantine (A.D. 1478-1494)
Gʷǝlt of ʾƎskǝndǝr, Constantine (A.D. 1478-1494)
Gʷǝltāt of the family of Gabra Samāʿt, in the reigns of Claudius and Malak Sagad (Śarḍa Dǝngǝl, died A.D. 1597).
Gʷǝlt of King Dāwit II, Claudius , Śarḍa Dǝngǝl, to the churches of Abba Victor and the blessed Virgin Mary.
Gʷǝlt of King ʾAdmās Sagad (Minās) to the churches of Abba Victor and the blessed Virgin Mary.
Gʷǝlt of queen ʾAdmās Mogasā to the churches of Abba Victor and the blessed Virgin Mary.
Gʷǝlt of a lady named Romān to the churches of Abba Victor and the blessed Virgin Mary.
A letter of Śarḍa Dǝngǝl and his mother, queen Śǝllus Ḫayle, appointing ʾabbā Ṣǝge Dǝngǝl, son of Zena Gabrǝʾel, to be mamhǝr in Gǝšǝn.
item.note: in the same hand as above

item.desc: In the old hand, Gʷǝltāt of kings ʿAmda Ṣǝyon , Zarʾa Yāʿqob (Constantine), Lǝbna Dǝngǝl, Fāsiladas, etc.
Gʷǝlt of King Śarḍa Dǝngǝl
some later documents, partly in Amharic
Gʷǝlt of Wanag Sagad or David (Lǝbna Dǝngǝl)
Gʷǝlt of Minās or ʾAdmās Sagad
Gʷǝlt of Nāʿod
A deed of Zarʾa Yāʿqob (Constantine), in the 15th year of his reign (A.D. 1448-1449).
item.q: በአኩቴተ፡ አብ፡ etc. ዝንቱ፡ ሥርዓት፡ ዘሠርዓ፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ዘርአ፡ ያዕቀብ፡ ዘተሠምየ፡ ቈሰጠንጢኖስ፡ እምአመ፡ ነግሠ፡ በ፲ወ፭ዓመት፡ እምድኅረ፡ ቀተ ሎ፡ ለበድላይ፡ ዕልው፡ በ፬ዓመት፡ ወ፬አ ውራኅ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ በምድረ፡ ኢባ፡ በወርኀ፡ ሚያዝያ፡ አመ፡ ፬ወሥርዓቱሰ፡ አኮ፡ ዘዮም፡ አላ፡ ዘትካት፡ etc.

item.desc: a prayer to the blessed Virgin Mary, on presenting an offering

desc.title: Maḫlet for the morning of Thursday in Passion Week

item.desc: Gʷǝlt of Lǝbna Dǝngǝl
A deed of the time of ʾIyasu (III. ?), in a modern hand, in Amharic
Gʷǝlt of ʿAmda Ṣǝyon
Gʷǝlt of Nāʿod
Gʷǝlt of Zarʾa Yāʿqob (Constantine)
Gʷǝlt of ʾƎskǝndǝr, Constantine
An inventory of the goods of the church of the blessed Virgin Mary at Aksum, in the time of Zarʾa Yāʿqob
item.q: ንወጥን፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ንዋየ፡ ማርያም፡ ዘአክሱም፡ ዘተኆለቈ፡ በመዋዕለ፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ዘርአ፡ ያዕቀብ፡ ወንቡረ፡ እድሂ፡ ገብረ፡ ሚካኤል፡ ወመኰንንሂ፡ ንዋይ።

item.desc: Deed of Zarʾa Yāʿqob (Constantine)
Gʷǝlt of Bakāffā
Deeds of Zarʾa Yāʿqob (Constantine)
Letter of Śarḍa Dǝngǝl
Deed of ʾIyoʾas I
Deed of Takla Hāymānot II
The note states that the manuscript belongs to the church of Madḫāne ʿAlam
Basmala in Arabic. The second line is difficult to read, maybe المجد في العلا or similar.

binding.decoNote: Blind-tooled leather cover, with textile inlays.

history.provenance: The manuscript had very probably belonged to a church in the Gondar area, from where it was taken by Tewodros and brought to Madḫāne ʿĀlam. It was then looted by the British Napier expedition in 1868.

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847
<hi rend="italics">Rǝstä Amba zä-Ǝsraʾel</hi>: Ein Dokument über Erbbesitz des äthiopischen Königshauses (<hi rend="italics">Ǝsraʾel</hi>) auf und um Amba-Säl aus dem 16. Jahrhundert
Studies in Ethiopian Languages, Literature, and History, Presented to Getatchew Haile by his Friends and Colleagues
Aethiopistische Forschungen

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Corrected date according to catalogue, added keywords
